title: Paxton crushes Cornyn in Senate primary in a big win for MAGA
description: John Cornyn became the second Republican senator to lose his seat in less than two weeks. A Trump endorsement helped propel Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton to a more than 25-point victory.

title: Why some Republicans are worried about Ken Paxton as a Senate nominee
description: Few politicians have garnered as much scandal in Texas as Paxton, but he has ignited the MAGA base, who see him as a fighter.

title: Did Trump pick the right blue for the Reflecting Pool? We asked a pool guy.
description: Old Glory Blue? American Flag Blue? Let's reflect on all the shades, while a federal judge mulls "aesthetic injury" in Trump's latest decorating flourish.

title: Trump to hold Cabinet meeting amid declining approval on Iran, economy
description: President Donald Trump will hold a Cabinet meeting at the White House, canceling a plan for a session at Camp David.

title: Political science professor weighs in on Tuesday's primaries in Texas
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with Brandon Rottinghaus, professor of political science at the University of Houston, about the outcome of Tuesday's primaries in Texas.

title: Texas general election matchups are finally set. Here's what you need to know
description: The Texas primary runoffs are over and November election matchups are set in major contests, like one for the U.S. Senate, as the results deliver lessons for both parties.

title: Clyburn's district stays intact as South Carolina Republicans scrap redistricting
description: The majority-Black district held for 34 years by South Carolina Democratic Rep. Jim Clyburn will survive intact, for now, after Republican state lawmakers rejected a plan to redraw congressional maps.

title: Dana White says it's an 'honor' to build a fight arena on the White House lawn
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with Dana White, president and CEO of the Ultimate Fighting Championship, about his plans to build a fighting arena on the White House lawn.

title: South Carolina lawmakers reject Trump-backed redistricting plan
description: South Carolina lawmakers rejected President Trump's call for redistricting to help the GOP hold onto the U.S. House in the midterms.

title: Texas Democrats reject House candidate who called for imprisoning Zionists
description: The runoff was a test of whether the Democratic Party could successfully distance itself from a left-wing candidate whom leaders called antisemitic.

title: Trump gathers Cabinet as he looks to seal deal to end war
description: President Trump will meet with his Cabinet on Wednesday at a precarious moment for talks aimed at ending the war with Iran. The emerging deal has already exposed the president to fierce criticism.

title: Texas Republicans nominate Ken Paxton for Senate seat, ousting incumbent John Cornyn
description: Controversial Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton challenged Sen. John Cornyn's reelection and won President Trump's endorsement in the bitter primary fight that cost Republicans more than $100 million.

title: RFK Jr. is now handling snakes. What does this mean?
description: Decoding the latest manly video from our secretary of health and human services.

title: The many hang-ups to a peace deal with Iran
description: Iran’s nuclear program is a big one.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: To repair ties with India, Rubio leans into pageantry
description: The top U.S. diplomat visited the world’s largest democracy in a bid to reverse soured relations over Trump’s tariff agenda and embrace of Pakistan.

title: Texas Republicans will choose a candidate for general election Senate contest Tuesday
description: Some Texas Republicans worry that the intraparty Senate primary fight could make it difficult for to unite behind Tuesday's winner to defeat a potentially strong Democratic challenge in the midterms.

title: To stop leaks, the Trump administration wants federal workers to sign NDAs
description: The Trump administration has proposed creating a new government-wide nondisclosure agreement for new and existing federal employees.

title: Trump-backed redistricting plan is rejected in the South Carolina Legislature
description: Republican state senators don't face election this year. Trump's urging for them to redistrict to help flip the House seat held by prominent Democrat Jim Clyburn was met with opposition.

title: Trump fumes at Congress and courts for holding up his ballroom
description: The president bulldozed the East Wing and remade federal panels that quickly approved his ballroom project. But he has faced barriers as he seeks to complete it.
